signals: Anthropic alcanza una valoración histórica de 965.000 millones de dólares tras una ronda de 65.000 millones.
Google DeepMind lanza Gemini for Science, un ecosistema de herramientas específicas para investigación científica.
Claude Opus 4.8 se posiciona como un agente autónomo avanzado con ingresos anuales de 47.000 millones de dólares.
NVIDIA anticipa una nueva generación de IA integrada en PCs, señalando un cambio de paradigma en el hardware de consumo.
Avances en compresión de frames e IP de simulación cuántica buscan mitigar los cuellos de botella de memoria en SoCs.
risks: Dependencia extrema de rondas de capital masivas para sostener el ritmo de desarrollo de modelos de frontera.
Limitaciones de ancho de banda y memoria en SoCs actuales para procesar vídeo e IA de alta carga en tiempo real.
Necesidad crítica de validación humana en descubrimientos científicos acelerados por IA para evitar alucinaciones.
watch: Presentaciones de hardware de NVIDIA en Taiwán para definir el estándar de los nuevos 'AI PCs'.
Rendimiento real de Claude Opus 4.8 en tareas de autonomía prolongada dentro de entornos corporativos.
Integración de los nuevos modelos Nano 2 y Gemini Embedding 2 en dispositivos de consumo y APIs empresariales.

items.title: We've raised $65 billion in Series H funding at a $965 billion post-money valuation, led by , Dragoneer, , and . This investment will help us advance our res...

items.why: Ronda de financiación sin precedentes que posiciona a Anthropic como uno de los gigantes tecnológicos del siglo.
items.title_es: Anthropic recauda 65.000 millones de dólares en una ronda Serie H

items.title: Earlier this month, our run-rate revenue crossed $47 billion. This growth has been driven by organizations across many industries deploying Claude in their c...
items.summary: Earlier this month, our run-rate revenue crossed $47 billion. This growth has been driven by organizations across many industries deploying Claude in their core operations, and by a growing number of people using it for their everyday work. Read more: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8: it builds on Opus 4.7 with sharper judgment, more honesty about its own progress, and the ability to work independently for longer than its predecessors. Available today at the same price.
items.raw_title: Earlier this month, our run-rate revenue crossed $47 billion. This growth has been driven by organizations across many industries deploying Claude in their c...
items.raw_summary: Earlier this month, our run-rate revenue crossed $47 billion. This growth has been driven by organizations across many industries deploying Claude in their core operations, and by a growing number of people using it for their everyday work. Read more: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8: it builds on Opus 4.7 with sharper judgment, more honesty about its own progress, and the ability to work independently for longer than its predecessors. Available today at the same price.
items.why: Crecimiento financiero explosivo y lanzamiento de Opus 4.8 con capacidades de ejecución autónoma mejoradas.
items.title_es: Anthropic supera los 47.000 millones de ingresos y lanza Claude Opus 4.8

items.title: We want to help scientists discover their next breakthrough with AI. Gemini for Science is our new suite of experimental tools to help them explore more hypo...
items.summary: We want to help scientists discover their next breakthrough with AI. Gemini for Science is our new suite of experimental tools to help them explore more hypotheses, validate work at scale, unpack literature with ease, and more 🧵 The media could not be played. Nano Banana 2 and Nano Banana Pro are now generally available. 🍌 Our best generation models are now available to developers and businesses in and via the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform API. Gemini Embedding 2: A Native Multimodal Embedding Model from Gemini 🚀 Today, we’re sharing the white paper for GE 2, our first native multimodal embedding model. Whether it’s text, audio, video, or , GE 2 provides a unified representation of the input.
items.raw_title: We want to help scientists discover their next breakthrough with AI. Gemini for Science is our new suite of experimental tools to help them explore more hypo...
items.raw_summary: We want to help scientists discover their next breakthrough with AI. Gemini for Science is our new suite of experimental tools to help them explore more hypotheses, validate work at scale, unpack literature with ease, and more ![Image 3: 🧵](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f9f5.svg) The media could not be played. Nano Banana 2 and Nano Banana Pro are now generally available. ![Image 5: 🍌](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f34c.svg) Our best image generation models are now available to developers and businesses in and via the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform API. Gemini Embedding 2: A Native Multimodal Embedding Model from Gemini ![Image 7: 🚀](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f680.svg) Today, we’re sharing the white paper for GE 2, our first native multimodal embedding model. Whether it’s text, audio, video, or image, GE 2 provides a unified representation of the input.
items.why: Lanzamiento de Gemini for Science y nuevos modelos Nano 2/Embedding 2 que optimizan la investigación y el desarrollo.
items.title_es: Gemini para la Ciencia: nuevas herramientas experimentales para el descubrimiento científico

items.title: CFrame60: Rewriting the Rules of Frame Compression
items.summary: Chips&38;Media CFrame60 is a next-generation frame compression hardware IP designed to address the growing bandwidth and memory challenges in modern SoCs targeting imaging, video, AI, and display applications. Unlike conventional compression architectures that prioritize either bandwidth reduction or quality,&8230; Read More The post CFrame60: Rewriting the Rules of Frame Compression appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.raw_title: CFrame60: Rewriting the Rules of Frame Compression
items.raw_summary: Chips&Media CFrame60 is a next-generation frame compression hardware IP designed to address the growing bandwidth and memory challenges in modern SoCs targeting imaging, video, AI, and display applications. Unlike conventional compression architectures that prioritize either bandwidth reduction or image quality,… Read More The post CFrame60: Rewriting the Rules of Frame Compression appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: Nueva IP de hardware diseñada para resolver la crisis de ancho de banda en SoCs modernos para IA y vídeo.
items.title_es: CFrame60: rediseñando las reglas de la compresión de frames

items.title: Quantum Simulation Using Decision Diagrams. Innovation in Verification
items.summary: Quantum gate simulation complexity explodes as qubit counts increase. One way to manage this complexity in simulation on classical computers is through use of decision diagrams in place of matrices. Paul Cunningham (GM, Verification at Cadence), Raúl Camposano (Silicon Catalyst, entrepreneur, former Synopsys CTO and lecturer&8230; Read More The post Quantum Simulation Using Decision Diagrams. Innovation in Verification appeared first on SemiWiki .
